title: PvPTrainingPlus
description: The all in one mod for pvp training and overall pvp enhancement
body:
![PvPTrainingPlus Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5108793531418eabcc3a35784cf9193c10288742.png)

# The All In One Mod To Train PvP

**Features:**
- Easily load kits with a command
- Ease of access to common pvp items like totems gapples etc...
- Practice Bot
- And More!

<details>
<summary>How To Load A Kit</summary>

Use the command /kit and choose one of the 5 kits
1. Kit1 is a basic cyrstal kit
2. Kit2 is a basic Diamond armor kit with prot 4 etc.
3. Kit3 is a diamond crystal kit
4. Kit4 is a UHC kit
5. Kit5 is a Netherite Potion Kit

</details>


<details>
<summary>Shop Options</summary>

**The Shop** is the main feature of this mod
use /shop to open the shop gui

Each icon signifies different shop item category

![Image No 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ab1767d88d388b69e98d817bb7c2a9b789a9e86.png)

UHC

![Image No 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57a1e601e773ee431dea11fd9f86514a8e0a4ba3.png)

Crystal Utilities 

![Image No 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b69fb3341870f51f35f97627c77a169ff9113d24.png)

Crystal PvP Armor

![Image No 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dfc678ee0f92422dc63c587b6b4d922a94c3ef4.png)

End Items (elytra,end chest, shulker)

![Image No 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/105cbe33d01e2014b255cbc1cb2f40c698a41536.png)


</details>


<details>
<summary>Additional Commands</summary>

- /saturation refills your saturation
- /practicezombie summons a practice zombie
- /practicebot summons a practice bot

</details>
